query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by parcel area descending, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: Get Trondheim municipality number, name and geometry

2.description: Get all county geometries and names

3.description: Join Trondheim municipality (step 1) with counties (step 2) to obtain the county name for Trondheim

4.description: Select parcels (teig) in Trondheim larger than 5000 m²

5.description: Select quick‑clay hazard polygons with high risk class

6.description: Find parcels (step 4) that intersect high‑risk quick‑clay areas (step 5)

7.description: Add municipality and county names (step 3) to the intersecting parcels (step 6)
